evals.prompt: Write a PRD for a JWT-based user authentication system for our SaaS web app. Users need to sign up, log in, reset passwords, and we want to support OAuth via Google. The backend is Node.js/Express.
evals.expected_output: A complete engineering PRD for a JWT auth system covering functional requirements for sign-up, login, password reset, and Google OAuth. Should include numbered requirements (FR-xxx), success metrics, scope, NFRs around security and performance, data model for users/sessions, and API contract sketches.

assertions.name: has-metadata-header
assertions.description: Document includes a metadata block with Status, Last Updated, and Version fields near the top

assertions.name: has-required-sections
assertions.description: Document contains Overview, Goals/Success Metrics, Scope, User Stories, Functional Requirements, Non-Functional Requirements, and Open Questions

assertions.name: requirements-are-numbered
assertions.description: Functional requirements use FR-xxx style numbering

assertions.name: requirements-have-priorities
assertions.description: At least some requirements have [P0]/[P1]/[P2] labels

assertions.name: has-out-of-scope
assertions.description: Document contains an explicit Out of Scope section or subsection

assertions.name: metrics-are-measurable
assertions.description: Goals section contains at least one quantified metric

assertions.name: covers-all-auth-flows
assertions.description: Functional requirements cover sign-up, login, password reset, and Google OAuth

evals.prompt: I want to build a simple mobile app for tracking habits. Write a PRD.
evals.expected_output: A complete engineering PRD for a habit tracking mobile app. Should infer reasonable scope, include prioritized functional requirements with FR-xxx numbering, and surface key open questions like platform choice, offline support, and sync.

assertions.name: has-metadata-header

assertions.name: metrics-are-measurable
assertions.description: Goals section contains at least one quantified metric

assertions.name: surfaces-key-ambiguities
assertions.description: Open Questions raises at least one critical ambiguity (platform choice, offline support, account/sync model)

evals.prompt: We need to add real-time notifications to our existing React/Node app. Users should get in-app notifications when someone comments on their post, mentions them, or likes their content. Write a spec for this.
evals.expected_output: A complete engineering PRD for a real-time notification feature covering the three trigger events, functional requirements for delivery and read state, NFRs for latency and scalability, and technical discussion of the real-time mechanism.

assertions.name: has-metadata-header
assertions.description: Document includes a metadata block with Status, Last Updated, and Version fields near the top

assertions.name: has-required-sections
assertions.description: Document contains Overview, Goals/Success Metrics, Scope, User Stories, Functional Requirements, Non-Functional Requirements, and Open Questions

assertions.name: addresses-realtime-mechanism
assertions.description: Technical section addresses the real-time delivery mechanism (WebSocket, SSE, polling, or similar)
